creator: gljohns@bellsouth.net
text:
Change where postilion looks for tkStepConfig.sh now that the
tkstep port has been updated.

Fix: 

Apply the following diff to '$PORTS/mail/postilion/Makefile'.

30c30
< CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --with-tk-config=${PREFIX}/share/tkstep8.0
---
> CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --with-tk-config=${PREFIX}/lib/tkstep8.0
